title: Saddle craft
description: This mod adds a saddle craft to your game
body:
more versions coming soon

Dependencies:
for fabric versions the [fabric api](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) is mandatory

What does this mod present in your game?

it adds a saddle that you can craft

![craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4d403e2a18806e72050c4e020c26ee3f1941dd12.png)

if you want more crafts I have this mod, download it [Here](https://modrinth.com/mod/impossible-crafts-now-possible)

If you find any bugs, feel free to let me know and I will fix them as soon as possible.

feel free to put this mod in modpacks

You can report bugs, make suggestions among other things through [Discord](https://discord.gg/6SSgCewv) 

you can see our Twitter [Here](https://x.com/Mods_ArthurOrsi)

• [My site](https://arthurorsi-mods.vercel.app/) •
